memory.title: Memory & GC

memory.chart.waiting: Waiting for more GC events to plot a trend...
memory.events.title: Recent GC events
memory.guide.title: What the generations mean
memory.guide.g0: Short-lived objects collected most often. Cheap and frequent; high counts here are normal.
memory.guide.g1: Objects that survived one collection. A middle tier between short-lived and long-lived.
memory.guide.g2: Long-lived objects, including the large object heap. Collections here are rarer and more expensive; frequent gen 2 activity signals real memory pressure.
memory.guide.interval: Interval is the time between GC observer polls, not the GC pause itself. Mono does not expose pause durations, so this is the sampling cadence rather than how long the game stalled.

patches.title: Harmony Patch Conflicts
patches.empty.hint: No other mod patches any method RimObs instruments. Nothing is competing for these methods.
patches.intro: Other mods patching the same methods RimObs instruments. This is informational, not an error - Harmony composes multiple patches. Use it to attribute behavior or overhead to a specific mod.
